name: 05-30-stage2-rvv-route-control-mask-tail-owner-boundary

description: Move selected-body route-control and mask/tail policy provider-plan construction out of central RVVEmitCRoutePlanning into explicit RVV-owned owner modules or an equivalent owner-local registry while preserving selected-body statement attach/selection behavior.
